name: us-building-permit-scraper
title: US Building Permit Scraper — Construction Lead Gen
description: Pull building permits from 33 US cities and counties. Returns permit type, address, project value, contractor name and license. Covers Chicago, NYC, LA, Seattle, Nashville, Raleigh, Reno, Louisville, Phoenix/Maricopa, and more. Filter by date, type, or value. Built for solar, roofing, HVAC, and construction lead gen.
